transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Meadowbrook Care Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Kessler. Something came up at work.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Webb, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your appointment with Dr. Kessler is this Thursday at 2 PM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do next Tuesday instead, maybe in the morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check... I have Tuesday at 9:30 AM or 11 AM available.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've moved your appointment to Tuesday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Kessler. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Have a good day.
